---
name: 🖥️ ux-reviewer
description: "Use when: reviewing UX of screens, flows, components, or code changes; auditing usability for clinic management systems; detecting pattern inconsistencies in UI; evaluating forms, modals, listings, navigation, and feedback messages; improving productivity and clarity of web interfaces for high-volume daily use."
tools: [read, agent, edit, search, github/add_issue_comment, github/get_file_contents, github/get_issue, github/get_pull_request, github/get_pull_request_comments, github/get_pull_request_files, github/get_pull_request_reviews, github/get_pull_request_status, github/list_commits, github/list_issues, github/list_pull_requests, github/search_code, github/search_issues, github/search_repositories, github/search_users]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Descreva o que deseja revisar: uma tela, um componente, um fluxo, um PR com alterações de UI, ou uma área específica da interface."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/ux-reviewer/ux-reviewer-prompt.md`
